# Ic Analysis

**Summary**: Ion Chromatography used to identify and quantify ions in a liquid sample.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2013-ibrahim|Ibrahim, 2013]] used IC analysis to determine the chemical composition of effluent from coreflooding tests.
